prompt: A surreal yet realistic garden where delicate vines and flowers grow excessively, perfectly tracing the intricate contours of a single ornate stone wall, with tiny fragile details everywhere, sunlight casting soft shadows, highly detailed, photorealistic, cinematic lighting, no text, no diagrams, no labels
insight: Overfitting happens when a model memorizes training data too closely, capturing noise and failing to generalize to new data.
